title: Lord, You Are The God Who Saves Me

verses.text: Lord, you are the God who saves me; I cry out both night and day. May my pleading come before you; Turn your ear to me, I pray.
For my soul is full of troubles, And my life draws near to death. Counted with the ones who perish, I have neither strength nor breath.
Deep in-to a pit you cast me, Made me loath-some in their eyes. There your wrath lies heav-y on me, I am crushed by all your waves.
You have made my friends forsake me, Made me loathsome in their eyes. I am trapped, cut off from rescue; Deep distress has dimmed my sight.
Is your love declared in death, your Faithfulness in Abbadon? Are your wonders known in darkness, Faithfulness where thoughts are gone?
But, O Lord, I cry to you; as Morning comes, to you I pray. Why, do you, O Lord, reject me, Turn your face from me away?
